creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
Since https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/18ea2757886c9b86143543599dc6b4fa4b122564 it requires C++11, but Tesseract requires C++17.

See:
* https://github.com/tesseract-ocr/tesseract#installing-tesseract
* https://github.com/tesseract-ocr/tesseract/blob/a6e0aa7f4810ff7c7a47f74403a6ffbf182b2d59/configure.ac#L435-L441
